privileged_info_summary: Discovered that the task is completely defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the target dataset (colorado_foothills.csv) are entirely missing from the environment, meaning the point cloud data is never instantiated and task_result.json is never created. Despite this, verifier.py expects the target output report to be exported to 'C:\workspace\data\surface_area_report.txt', and its logic explicitly expects parsing of 2D_AREA_M2, 3D_AREA_M2, SURFACE_RATIO, and NUM_TRIANGLES. The task is unscorable because the verifier relies on missing export scripts to read the results.
